data.title: Contract: ticket-clarity-check.sh output interface
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-clarity-check-output.md defining the output contract between ticket-clarity-check.sh (emitter) and sprint SKILL.md Phase 1 clarity gate (parser).

## Contract Specification
- Signal Name: CLARITY_SCORE
- Emitter: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-clarity-check.sh
- Parser: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (Phase 1 clarity gate)
- Output: JSON to stdout: {"score": N, "verdict": "pass|fail", "threshold": N}
- Exit codes: 0=pass (score >= threshold), 1=fail (score < threshold), 2=error/invalid-input
- Testing mode: --stdin flag reads JSON ticket data from stdin instead of calling ticket CLI
- Example output included in contract

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — static documentation asset with no executable assertion possible (unit exemption criterion #3).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Contract file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-clarity-check-output.md
- [ ] Contains Signal Name, Emitter, Parser, Fields, and Example sections
  Verify: grep -q "Signal Name" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-clarity-check-output.md && grep -q "Emitter" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-clarity-check-output.md && grep -q "Fields" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ticket-clarity-check-output.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
